impact: This gives supervisor repair cycles deterministic instructions to stop retrying broad extractor implementations after repeated SyntaxError or compile failures, split recovery into syntax-first and fixture-first steps, and constrain worker proposals to smaller syntactically valid file sets before more autonomous attempts.
summary: Add explicit syntax-failure repair guidance for PP&D supervisor interventions.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 5 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
